💬 Book Your Session
FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before booking your session.

1

How do I book a session?

Simply message me on WhatsApp at 07590 411409 or DM me on Instagram @PHOTO_BY_AISHA. Tell me which package you're interested in and your preferred dates and I'll get back to you quickly!

2

Where is the studio?

The studio is at 9 Fairfax Dr, Westcliff-on-Sea, Southend-on-Sea SS0 9AG. Exact parking and access details will be sent to you when your session is confirmed.

3

What's included in a birthday cake smash?

Please contact me for pricing on all packages — I'd love to chat about what suits you best!

4

When should I book a newborn session?

I recommend booking during your pregnancy to secure your date. Newborn sessions are best done within the first 5–14 days after birth. Message me on WhatsApp or Instagram and we'll plan it together!

5

What is the family photoshoot package?

The family photoshoot includes 5 professionally edited digital photos, a studio session, and digital download delivery. Perfect for all family sizes!

6

Can I choose a theme or colour scheme?

Absolutely! Every session is fully themed and styled. When you message to book, just let me know your ideas — colours, themes, or anything you have in mind — and I'll plan everything for you.

Natural, warm & relaxed photography capturing your family's most precious milestones.

📍 9 Fairfax Dr, Westcliff-on-Sea, Southend-on-Sea SS0 9AG
